sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>

# Check what changed - compare before/after
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
after = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']

print("Before RIGHT:")
for n in before:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, at ({min(rows)},{min(cols)})")

print("\nAfter RIGHT:")
for n in after:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, at ({min(rows)},{min(cols)})")

# Check the blue object specifically
for n in after:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"\nBlue object: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
